title: Orchestrate Phase 1 Input
description: Input contract for the orchestrate-phase1 webhook and manual trigger. Defines the structure of intake_payload accepted by the full Phase 1–5 chain.

intake_payload.description: The store configuration payload. Drives all downstream planning phases.

project_id.description: Unique identifier for this store project. Lowercase, digits, hyphens, underscores. Used as directory name in self-hosted mode.

project_name.description: Human-readable store name used in generated content.

primary_market.description: Primary geographic market for the store.

target_markets.description: All markets the store will serve. Must include primary_market.

languages.description: All supported languages. Must include primary_language.

vertical.description: Product vertical. Drives market intelligence and competitor analysis.

store_type.description: Store format. Defaults to multi-product-store if omitted.

business_model.description: Operational business model. Defaults to ecommerce if omitted.

price_positioning.description: Price tier positioning. Used to calibrate tone and competitor clustering.

brand_style.description: Visual and tone brand style direction. Used in brand positioning and design system phases.

publish_mode.description: Controls whether generated content is auto-published to Shopify. Defaults to draft-and-review.

faq_intensity.description: How aggressively to generate FAQ content.

knowledge_content_priority.description: Type of editorial content to prioritize (e.g. 'guides', 'comparisons', 'news').

competitor_urls.description: URLs of known competitor stores. Used in competitor cluster analysis.

brand_role.description: Optional: The role the brand plays for the customer (e.g. 'expert', 'companion', 'enabler').

must_feel_like.description: Optional: Free-text brand feel descriptor (positive direction).

must_not_feel_like.description: Optional: Free-text brand feel descriptor (exclusion direction).

special_notes.description: Optional: Free-text notes passed to LLM synthesis phases as additional context.

smoke_test_config.description: Cloud-mode only: supply STORE_OS_* env vars inline when process.env is unavailable.
